name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select trust deed execution date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city where trust deed is executed

name: trust_name
label: Trust Name
hint: Enter full name of the trust

name: trust_type
label: Trust Type
hint: Select the category of trust

name: trust_address
label: Registered Office Address
hint: Enter complete address of the trust

name: financial_year
label: Accounting / Financial Year
hint: Example: 1 April to 31 March

name: settlor_name
label: Settlor Name
hint: Enter full name of settlor

name: settlor_address
label: Settlor Address
hint: Enter settlor residential address

name: settlor_age
label: Settlor Age
hint: Enter age of settlor

name: settlor_occupation
label: Settlor Occupation
hint: Enter occupation of settlor

name: settlor_pan
label: Settlor PAN
hint: Enter PAN number of settlor

name: settlor_aadhaar
label: Settlor Aadhaar
hint: Enter Aadhaar number of settlor

name: number_of_trustees
label: Number of Trustees
hint: Enter total number of trustees

name: managing_trustee
label: Managing Trustee Name
hint: Enter name of managing or chief trustee

name: beneficiary_details
label: Beneficiary Details
hint: Enter beneficiaries or class of beneficiaries

name: property_type
label: Trust Property Type
hint: Select the form of initial trust corpus

name: trust_property_amount
label: Initial Trust Property Amount
hint: Enter amount settled in trust, e.g. 1000

name: trust_property_description
label: Trust Property Description
hint: Describe movable property, securities, articles, or other corpus details

name: immovable_property_schedule
label: Schedule of Property
hint: Enter survey number, area, and full schedule details of the immovable property

name: trust_purpose
label: Objectives of Trust
hint: Mention charitable, religious, educational, or family purposes

name: tax_registration_intent
label: Apply for 12A / 80G Registration
hint: Tick if the trust intends to apply for income tax exemption registration

name: tax_exemption_clause_details
label: Tax Exemption / Non-Profit Clauses
hint: Specify no-profit motive, charitable application of income, and exemption-related wording

name: income_tax_exemption_clause
label: Income Tax Exemption Clause
hint: Enter specific exemption-related clause for public charitable trusts

name: powers_of_trustees
label: Powers of Trustees
hint: Define powers like investment, administration, and bank operations

name: duties_of_trustees
label: Duties of Trustees
hint: Define responsibilities of trustees

name: include_bank_operation_details
label: Add Custom Bank Operation Details
hint: Tick if the trust needs a custom bank operation clause

name: bank_account_details
label: Bank Operation Details
hint: Specify how bank accounts will be opened and operated

name: appointment_removal_mode
label: Appointment / Removal Procedure
hint: Choose whether to use a standard or custom procedure

name: appointment_removal_trustees
label: Custom Appointment / Removal of Trustees
hint: Mention custom procedure for adding or removing trustees

name: succession_plan_mode
label: Successor Trustee Appointment Method
hint: Select how a successor trustee is appointed on death or vacancy

name: succession_procedure
label: Custom Succession Procedure
hint: Describe the custom succession procedure for replacement trustees

name: meeting_rules
label: Meetings
hint: Define meeting frequency and notice rules

name: quorum_requirements
label: Quorum Requirements
hint: Specify quorum needed for trustee meetings

name: accounts_audit
label: Accounts & Audit
hint: Mention accounting, bookkeeping, and auditing process

name: include_indemnity_clause
label: Include Trustee Indemnity Clause
hint: Tick to include indemnity protection for honest acts or omissions

name: indemnity_clause
label: Trustee Indemnity Clause
hint: Describe indemnity protection for trustees acting in good faith

name: include_advisory_board
label: Include Advisory Board
hint: Tick if the trust wants to appoint subject matter experts or advisors

fields.name: role
fields.label: Advisory Role
fields.hint: Describe advisory scope or committee role

name: amendment_clause
label: Amendment Clause
hint: Conditions to modify trust deed

name: termination_date
label: Termination Date
hint: Select termination date if the private trust has a defined end date

name: dissolution_clause
label: Dissolution Clause
hint: Explain how the trust may be dissolved and the process to follow

name: dissolution_recipient
label: Dissolution Recipient
hint: State whether assets move to a similar charity or revert to beneficiaries, as applicable

name: irrevocability_clause
label: Irrevocability Clause
hint: Declare whether trust is irrevocable

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Applicable law, e.g. Indian Trusts Act, 1882 and local registration law
